title: Swipe right, next screen
scenario: Quick Start Guide onboarding screens do not match Figma design when swiping through earbuds and charge case views
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (or after clearing app data) to enter the Quick Start Guide (QSG) onboarding flow.
On the first QSG screen, swipe right from the right edge of the screen.
Observe the second QSG screen showing two earbuds.
Swipe right from the right edge of the screen again.
Observe the third QSG screen showing the charge case (outside view).
Swipe right from the right edge of the screen again.
Observe the fourth QSG screen showing the charge case (inside view with earbuds).
expected: All QSG screens (two earbuds, charge case outside, charge case inside) display correctly and match the Figma design specifications.
